title: Maskborne
body:
# **Unleash Your Inner Hollow – Vizard Mod for Minecraft**

**Tutorial**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/keDWtdK7Nrs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Step into the world of Bleach with the Vizard Mod, where Shinigami powers clash with Hollow instincts. Unlock the secrets of the Hōgyoku, awaken your Vizard Mask, and survive the dangerous process of Hollowfication.

Progress through multiple Hollowfication stages, each one bringing you closer to mastering your inner Hollow—but be warned, each stage comes with greater risk. Equip your Vizard Mask to gain powerful buffs and abilities, but time is limited—push it too far, and lose control.

Train, evolve, and conquer your inner self in this high-stakes combat system that fuses Shinigami skill and Hollow rage. With a new progression system, custom powers, mask time limits, and more, the Vizard Mod brings a dark and thrilling twist to your Minecraft adventure.
